titleStmt.title: SII 38.145: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 145. (A.R. No. 145 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: A pillar of the verandah, round the central shrine, Ādhipurīśvara temple.
Begins with the meykīrtti of the king, Pugaḻ mādu viḷaṅga.

It records a gift of twelve milch cows for supplying pañchagavyam for the bath of god of Tiruvoṟṟiyūr of Puḻal-nāḍu in Puḻal-kōṭṭam (a sub-division of) Jayaṅkoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam, during the early morning service (śiṟukālai sandhi) and also for burning two lamps at night till the deity retired to bed chambers, by a certain Āchchaṉ Tiruchchiṟṟambalam uḍaiyāṉ alias Kurukularāyar of Poṉpaṟṟi in Tirumiḻalai-kūṟṟam in Rājarājappāṇḍi-nāḍu. The cows were entrusted to the custody of dēvakaṉmis.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pukaḻmātuviḷaṅka cayamātuvirumpa nilamakaḷ nilava mala
rmakaḷ puṇara Urimaiyiṟ ciṟanta maṇimuṭicūṭi villavar nilaikeṭa
minavar kulaitara vikkaṇar ciṅkaṇar mel kaṭal pāyat tikkaṉaittun taṉ ca
kkaranaṭātti virasiṅkāsanattup puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum vī
ṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirājakecaripanmarāṉa Uṭaiyaār śrīkulottuṅ
ka coḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu pattāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭala
ttup puḻaṟkoṭṭattup puḻalnāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiyārkku
rājarājap pāṇṭi nāṭṭu tirumiḻalaikkūṟṟatu poṉpaṟṟiyuṭaiyār Āccaṉ tiru
cciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉārāṉa kurukularājar Uṭaiyārkku ciṟukālai san=tiyil pañcakau
vviyam Āṭiaruḷavum Iravu Uṭaiyār tiruppaḷḷiaṟaikku Eḻuntaruḷumaḷa
vum Iraṇṭu panam viḷakkuerippatākavum yāṇṭu pattāvatu mutal vaiyt
ta pālpacu panniraṇṭu Ivayai mutalāka Āṇṭuvaraiyum kaṇṭu mutalākki Inni
vantañ celuttuvatāka tevarkanmikaḷ vacam viṭṭu cilālekai paṇṇi nivantañ ce
ytatu panmāheśvarairaṣai .
Digital edition of SII 38.145 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
